commands: backend: python manage.py test execution signal_intake  (refactor regression)
backend: python manage.py makemigrations --check --dry-run execution strategies trading signal_intake
expected_results: At DEFAULT config (signal_execution_mode=SHADOW, auto_execution_enabled=False, assignment MANUAL) no PLACE_ORDER is ever created and the manual path is unchanged.
promote_plan_to_demo_jobs creates PLACE_ORDER jobs ONLY under global mode DEMO; under SHADOW it raises execution_mode_mismatch and creates nothing.
The shadow path still creates PLACE_ORDER_SHADOW only and refuses under DEMO mode; its payload/audit/idempotency are behaviourally unchanged (E2a/E2b tests green).

The DEMO payload is market-only with execution_mode=DEMO, correlation_id, short WAY{plan}L{leg} comment, and signal_timestamp; the demo path inherits every demo-only/symbol/SL-TP/lot-cap/staleness/risk/kill-switch gate.

The auto-router creates PLACE_ORDER ONLY when fully armed (mode DEMO + AUTO_DEMO assignment + all AND-of-gates); default (SHADOW) → PLACE_ORDER_SHADOW; DEMO+AUTO_SHADOW-assignment → MANUAL; defaults → no jobs.
A closed demo trade whose order comment carries WAY{plan}L{leg} links back to its plan (correlation_id/source/execution_job) via close_monitor's fallback even with a blank Trade.correlation_id.
No AUTO_LIVE path; no order_send called; no real order placed (the worker is not invoked). Migrations additive; full backend suite green; secret-scan + governance pass.
actual_results: execution.tests_e3_demo_promotion: Ran 17 tests OK (9 core + 8 DEMO gate-inheritance).

PromotionTests: demo→PLACE_ORDER under DEMO (payload execution_mode DEMO, correlation, comment, market-only) PASS; demo refused under SHADOW (execution_mode_mismatch, 0 jobs) PASS; shadow still shadow-only + refused under DEMO PASS; demo inherits account_not_demo guard PASS.

RouterTests: default SHADOW → PLACE_ORDER_SHADOW only, 0 PLACE_ORDER PASS; armed AUTO_DEMO → PLACE_ORDER only (approval APPROVED, 0 shadow, 0 other executable) PASS; DEMO+AUTO_SHADOW-assignment → MANUAL (approval PENDING, 0 jobs) PASS; defaults → 0 jobs PASS.

DemoGateInheritanceTests (added after review): under mode DEMO, promote_plan_to_demo_jobs is refused with 0 jobs for kill_switch_engaged, source_not_enabled, stale_signal, missing_stop_loss, missing_take_profit, symbol_not_allowed, lot_out_of_range, total_lot_exceeds_cap — proving the demo path inherits the full E2a gate matrix, not just the demo-only guard.
LinkageTests: closed demo trade with WAY comment → outcome WIN, correlation backfilled from plan, signal_source=wayond, execution_job linked PASS.
Refactor regression: execution + signal_intake + E2a = Ran 58 tests OK (SHADOW promotion, auto_router, close_monitor preserved).
Full backend suite: Ran 456 tests OK (448 pre-review + 8 DEMO gate-inheritance tests).

makemigrations --check execution: No changes detected (only execution/0014 DEMO enum is mine; strategies index-rename output is pre-existing drift, untouched by this packet). make secret-scan OK; governance-check OK; EVIDENCE-LINT PASS.

Adversarial 4-lens real-order-boundary review (5 agents, ~429k tokens): decision GO, must_fix=[]. The one recurring finding (route reads global mode twice) was synthesized as a FALSE POSITIVE for safety (assignment_mode+promote_fn are a matched pair; _validate re-gates the mode atomically). Applied optional hardening: single-read dispatch via _tier_by_router_mode (removes the double-read); DEMO gate-matrix tests (above). Rejected the re.fullmatch nit on engineering grounds — MT5 brokers append [tp]/[sl] suffixes to comments on close, so anchored-start re.match is the robust choice for the winning-trade linkage path.
limitations: Repo-only, DISABLED BY DEFAULT — no provider arming, no deployment, no E3 enablement, no auto-live, no order_send, no real trade, no production behaviour change. E3 remains RED.

No real order is placed anywhere: the demo promotion creates a PLACE_ORDER ExecutionJob row only; the MT5 trade-ingest worker (which would order_send) is never invoked in tests and this code is not deployed.

Correlation propagation is closed via close_monitor's comment-tag fallback (repo-only) — the live ingest worker (upsert_trades) was deliberately NOT changed to avoid destabilising the live trading path; a worker-side Trade.correlation_id population is an optional future robustness item.

Arming a real demo trade still requires the Nuno-only governance gates (Blueprint-06 ratification, recorded E3 sign-off, DEMO caps, node decision), the operator flips, and a deploy + preflight — all separate, future, gated packets.
